title: Workflow Overhead Context-Cost Review
goal: Check whether the repo's own startup and handoff guidance imposes unnecessary rereads or dead-end workflow steps on routine agent work.
non_goals: Validation-lane correctness outside startup and handoff reading cost

review_mode.review question: Do the repo-defined startup and handoff docs add duplicated or stale workflow overhead for routine agent use?

findings.title: Contributor playbook duplicates the startup path internally
findings.summary: `docs/contributor-playbook.md` carries two startup sections, `Agent Maintainer Path` and `Start Here`, that repeat the same early-read and compact-summary guidance with only minor wording differences.
findings.evidence: Both sections tell maintainers to read `AGENTS.md`, then `TODO.md`, then prefer `agentic-planning-bootstrap summary --format json` before opening raw planning files; each section also controls when to read active execplans and package-local docs.
findings.risk if unchanged: Agents pay extra reading and comparison cost to determine which startup path is canonical, and the duplicated sections can drift apart as the workflow evolves.
findings.suggested action: Collapse the startup guidance into one canonical section in `docs/contributor-playbook.md` that extends `AGENTS.md` instead of restating the same sequence twice.
findings.promotion trigger: Next maintainer-doc cleanup or contributor playbook edit

findings.title: Contributor playbook points to a removed review mode
findings.summary: `docs/contributor-playbook.md` still tells maintainers to use `.agentic-workspace/planning/reviews/README.md` `ordinary-use-pull` mode, but that review mode no longer exists in the current review portfolio.
findings.evidence: The playbook says `Use .agentic-workspace/planning/reviews/README.md ordinary-use-pull mode...`, while `.agentic-workspace/planning/reviews/README.md` currently defines `context-cost` for startup and handoff reading-cost audits and contains no `ordinary-use-pull` mode.
findings.risk if unchanged: A maintainer following the documented path hits a dead end and either spends extra tokens reinterpreting the intended mode or skips the review path entirely.
findings.suggested action: Replace the stale review-mode reference with the current `context-cost` route, or remove the sentence if the contributor playbook should no longer route this workflow through review artifacts.

recommendation.promote: both findings to canonical docs cleanup
